html:
> ̶M̶a̶n̶y̶ People are ego-driven. Their opinions aren’t positions they hold; they are the position.

> ̶M̶o̶s̶t̶ People don’t reason their way to conclusions and then feel accordingly. They feel first, then reason backward to justify the feeling.

ftfy

There are no people that aren’t ego-driven or feel first and then reason backward. There are just situations sometimes where it doesn’t look that way
